source_text: • MCC: Morphological counting complexity (Sagot, 2013) , using the values for Europarl reported by Cotterell et al. (2018) . • ADL: Average dependency length (Futrell et al., 2015) , using the values reported for Europarl by . • HPE-mean: mean over all Europarl tokens of Head-POS Entropy (Dehouck and Denis, 2018) , as reported by . • Six different linguistic distances (genetic, syntactic, featural, phonological, inventory, geographic) from the URIEL Typological Database (Littell et al., 2017) . We refer the reader to for more details.
raw_output: • MCC: Morphological counting complexity (Sagot, 2013), using the Europarl values reported by Cotterell et al. (2018). • ADL: Average dependency length (Futrell et al., 2015), using the values reported for Europarl by . • HPE-mean: the mean, over all Europarl tokens, of Head-POS Entropy (Dehouck and Denis, 2018), as reported by . • Six distinct linguistic distances (genetic, syntactic, featural, phonological, inventory, and geographic) from the URIEL Typological Database (Littell et al., 2017). We refer the reader to for further details.
